description_long: This is a compact, maroon-colored Suzuki hatchback car with a modern, aerodynamic design. The vehicle features four passenger doors and a rear hatch door, with sleek, contoured body panels and tinted windows. The front grille is black with a honeycomb pattern, flanked by angular headlights and a Suzuki emblem at the center. The side profile reveals alloy wheels, body-colored side mirrors, and flush door handles. At the rear, the car displays a prominent Suzuki badge, 'SWIFT' model badge, and a rear windshield with horizontal defroster lines. The overall appearance is stylish and practical, suitable for urban driving and parking in tight spaces.
description: A maroon Suzuki Swift hatchback with four doors, alloy wheels, and a modern, compact design. Features include a black honeycomb grille, tinted windows, and a rear hatch door.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black honeycomb grille, Suzuki emblem, angular headlights, and windshield wipers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the two passenger doors, alloy wheels, and body-colored side mirror.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the Suzuki and Swift badges, rear hatch door, taillights, and rear windshield with defroster lines.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the two passenger doors, alloy wheels, and body-colored side mirror, mirroring the left side.
